supply_chain.dependencies: Single-source suppliers for certain systems, components and parts; concentration of EV battery raw materials processing in China; reliance on joint ventures in China for manufacturing; dependence on two largest suppliers for approximately 11% of total purchases
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions due to geopolitical actions, labor disruptions, catastrophic weather events, public health crises; single-source supplier dependencies; concentration of EV battery raw materials in China subject to import/export restrictions or tariffs; supplier financial difficulties or solvency problems; just-in-time manufacturing increases vulnerability to supply disruptions

regulatory_risks: Corporate Average Fuel Economy (CAFE) standards and GHG emission regulations in U.S. (federal and state level)
California Air Resources Board (CARB) Advanced Clean Cars II (ACC II) program requiring increasing percentages of ZEV sales through 2035
CARB Advanced Clean Trucks (ACT) program requiring ZEV sales for medium- and heavy-duty vehicles
Canadian federal ZEV Availability Standard requiring 100% ZEV sales by 2035
Quebec and British Columbia ZEV sales requirements
China Phase 5 and Phase 6 fuel consumption requirements and New Energy Vehicle (NEV) credit mandates
Brazil L7 and L8 emission standards
European Union Euro 7 emission standards and phase-out of ICE vehicles by 2035
EU regulations on EV battery design, use, recyclability and recycling
Vehicle safety standards and recall requirements (NHTSA in U.S., various international jurisdictions)
Chemical regulations including PFAS reporting and elimination requirements (Minnesota and other states)
Data privacy and protection laws (California Consumer Privacy Act, EU GDPR, UK Data Protection Act)
Export controls, economic sanctions, import controls and foreign investment measures (U.S. and foreign countries)
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and anti-corruption laws
Right to repair laws potentially exposing vehicle systems to third-party access
Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) incentives and compliance requirements
European Commission and UK Competition and Markets Authority investigations on end-of-life vehicle coordination
State and federal consumer protection laws related to data collection and use
Autonomous vehicle regulations (federal, state, provincial and local)
Product liability and breach of warranty claims under consumer protection laws

sanction_risks: Broad economic sanctions on Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Sudan and Syria
Russia and Belarus sanctions following March 2022 exit from Russia business
Sanctions on certain provinces in Ukraine
Potential U.S.-China trade tensions and tariffs impacting operations and supply chain
Export control restrictions on technology and components
Restrictions on transactions involving certain territories, entities or individuals
